title: IaP Provider Plugin Manifest v1
description: Schema for provider package manifests (manifest.json, apiVersion plugin.iap.dev/v1) per IEP-0012. A provider package is a versioned, signed plugin bundling mapping artifacts plus hooks/handlers for one provider namespace. Loaders MUST verify the signature against a trust store and publisher allowlist, verify every artifact digest, check specCompat/sdkCompat, and statically verify coverage tiling; any failure refuses the whole package (PC-1, no degraded load).

name.description: Unique package name checked against the publisher allowlist (e.g. iap-provider-example).

namespace.description: Provider namespace this package realizes; every bundled mapping's provider field MUST equal it (matches the extension namespace grammar).

version.description: Package version (semver). Breaking changes to the package's own schemas or realization behavior require a major bump.

specCompat.description: IaP specification version range this package supports (semver range expression, e.g. ">=1.0.0 <2.0.0"). A loader MUST refuse the package when the specification version in force is outside this range.

sdkCompat.description: Provider-SDK version range this package supports (semver range expression). A loader MUST refuse the package when the SDK version in force is outside this range.

certificationLevel.description: The single certification level the package claims: core (mapping-only), execution (core + lifecycle handlers), or drift (execution + inverse projection). Partial claims are non-conformant (PC-5).

artifacts.description: Package-relative paths of the artifacts the package ships. Every referenced file MUST appear in integrity.digests.

extensionSchema.description: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) validating this package's extensions.<namespace> refinement blocks.

conformanceCases.description: Directory of conformance cases (conformance-case-v1) and their corpus documents.

capabilities.description: What the package can do: the IaP kinds it maps and the hooks/handlers it implements. Kinds listed here MUST exactly match the kinds covered by the bundled mapping artifacts.

kinds.description: IaP kinds the package's mappings realize.

hooks.description: Pure, sandboxed hooks the package implements; hooks never receive credentials.

handlers.description: Execution-side handlers (certification level execution and above); only these receive credentials, at deploy time only.

attestations.description: Optional package-relative path of the attestation module: pure predicates registered per (capability, target type) that map plan attributes to abstract capability verdicts.

integrity.description: Content pinning for every artifact file the package ships.

digests.description: Map of package-relative file path to its digest, sha256:<hex> over the exact file bytes. Loaders MUST verify every entry and refuse on any mismatch or missing entry.

signature.description: Detached signature over the canonical signing form: the manifest with this signature member removed, serialized as compact UTF-8 JSON with keys sorted by Unicode code point.

keyId.description: Identifier resolved against the loader's trust store (keyId to public-key map). Unknown key ids refuse the package.

alg.description: Signature algorithm; only ed25519 is defined for v1.

value.description: Base64-encoded ed25519 signature over the canonical signing form.

semver.description: Semantic version: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH with optional prerelease.

semverRange.description: Space-separated comparator list, all of which must hold (e.g. ">=1.0.0 <2.0.0"). Operators: >=, >, <=, <, =; a bare version means exact equality.

relativePath.description: Package-relative POSIX path (directories may carry a trailing slash). Segments MUST NOT be . or .. and the path MUST NOT be absolute; loaders reject traversal outside the package directory.
